/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -m64 "CMakeFiles/gsl-info.dir/src/gsl-info.cc.o" -o ../bin/gsl-info  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/houjunren/Desktop/OSCA_cis-trans/build/Release/_deps/gsl-build/ampl amplgsl.dll ../../../lib/libasl.a ../libgsl.a ../libgslcblas.a -lm
